---
name: "Reading To Report"
description: "Turn selected paper notes and idea notes into a hybrid progress report with synthesis and action items."
argument-hint: "paper keys, idea keys, topic, or date range"
agent: "agent"
---

Generate a hybrid progress report from the selected inputs.

Requirements:

- summarize the scope and trigger
- synthesize the main themes instead of listing notes independently
- highlight the most important papers
- update the linked ideas
- end with concrete action items and suggested next reads

Match the workspace report conventions in `templates/hybrid_report.md`.
